page.title: Worlds
page.subtitle: Build a world from its lore — characters, places, factions — with no manuscript required.

empty.title: No worlds yet
empty.description: Create your first world to start authoring lore — no chapters needed.

create.title: New world
create.description: Name your world. You can author its lore right away.

lore.title: World bible
lore.extractionOptional: Author lore directly — characters, places, factions. No manuscript needed. Extraction from prose is optional; this world bible is the anchor.
lore.anchorUnavailable: This world has no bible anchor yet — lore authoring is unavailable.
lore.added: Lore added to your world bible.

graph.title: World graph
graph.subtitle: A read-only view of how your world’s lore connects.
graph.rollupSubtitle: A read-only roll-up of every member book’s canon graph, rendered together as per-book islands.
graph.truncated: showing the top {{n}} — a large book can crowd a smaller one
graph.hint: Scroll to zoom · drag empty space to pan · click a node for detail
graph.loadFailed: Failed to load the world graph: {{error}}
graph.empty: No world knowledge yet — build the bible or extract a member book to roll its graph up here.

populate.whatIfHint: Branch a what-if from a canon work
populate.whatIfNeedsCanon: Add a book with a canon work first — a what-if branches from canon.
populate.addBookTitle: Add a book to this world
populate.addBookDesc: Attach an existing book or create a new one — it joins the world’s timeline and graph.

living.heading: Living world
living.subtitle: Your world’s canon and its what-if branches as a navigable timeline. Click a work to open it.
living.title: Living world
living.hint: Scroll to zoom · drag empty space to pan · click a work to open it
living.loadFailed: Failed to load the living world: {{error}}
living.empty: No works in this world yet — start a book or a what-if to grow its timeline.
